race.comment: The Waller-trained UNIQUELY FAMOUS (6) tackled a stronger maiden first-up over 1350m at Ipswich three weeks ago and was never in contention. More at home over this sort of trip and there is far less depth to this field. Watch for a much better run. Stablemate BOMB PERIGNON (7) has been freshened up since a career-best performance over 1666m at Ipswich on 4 May, beaten just over a length after racing up on the pace throughout. Meets an inferior field today so if he handles the going this looks a big breakthrough opportunity. PLAY IT COOL (5) ran second on a heavy track at this track two back - in the mix with a return to sloppy conditions. COLORADO TYCOON (3) battled on well to finish runner-up on a heavy deck at Port Macquarie last time out. Must be considered in similar circumstances this afternoon. HALLOWEEN HOLLY (8) improved out of sight last start when lining up for just the third time. In the mix out to this trip in a small field.
